SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Set For Trial On Jul-22-13 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Continued To Aug-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for a Trial De Novo on a Small Claims Appeals Claim.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos & Mars Goodman, Proceedings not reported.

10:45 AM Martin B. Bonfillio, Esq., appearing for Appellant Jerome Goldstein, et al.,
Derek Bruhn, dba Pacific Belt & Supply appearing on his own behalf.
Parties opening statements to the court.
11:00 AM Court orders parties to meet and confer in good faith.
11:30 AM Proceedings resumed.

Case settled. Appellant Jerome Goldstein agreed to pay Respondent Derek Bruhn $4,376.00.
Check was given to Mr. Bruhn in open court. Mr. Bruhn will dismiss case with prejudice.
Counsel for Appellant to submit stipulated agreement to the court within five days.
